blocks.text: Real Madrid face Mallorca at 16:15 — a win closes the gap to one point before Barça kick off. If Madrid deliver first, the Metropolitano becomes the biggest La Liga night of 2026.
🎾 Sat 06:00 — Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters, Ruud launches clay season at his hunting ground
♟️ Sat 10:15 — Grenke Chess Festival R4, Carlsen perfect 3/3 and in commanding form

blocks.label: 🗓️ Don't Miss
items: 🚴 Sun 10:00 — Tour of Flanders, seven Norwegians chase Monument glory on the cobbles
⚽ Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid, Champions League QF first leg at the Bernabéu
